THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOSE, MARCELO JOSE, GEMMA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 312 PIOCHE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $7,200.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,200.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-29-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
